textByHash.c27607cbed9f375e051919106ed283de5e642a50: Just soaking up the thirst of the land, man.
textByHash.3e45c997d66795305a35b3290ca221e135b65c25: Let me show you what I mean.
textByHash.bae4cc305c43b649358376037a45307a53c9d0d2: I once met a cyclops who sold some wonderful hand-made souvenirs.
textByHash.05db8966d0458a74d5a6f6f1fc52785487562125: A holiday is better if you bring a couple of goofy friends along.
